full-comment.comment: Standalone comment or preamble line (starts with optional spaces then ;)
full-comment.name: comment.line.semicolon.z80disasm

label.comment: Label definition at column 0: 'labelname:' with optional inline comment

address.comment: Hex address at the start of an instruction line: 0xNNNN
address.name: constant.numeric.hex.z80disasm

inline-comment.comment: Hex+ASCII annotation appended to instruction lines as '; XX XX  ..'
inline-comment.name: comment.line.semicolon.z80disasm
